deals.title: 340 Sollock Dr
deals.notes: Listing terminated by mutual agreement. Clients moving back in to make updates and repairs before relisting. Underwater by approximately $93,000 to $143,000. Three paths identified: short sale, VA assumption, or price reduction with cash to close.
deals.next: Confirm signed termination release received from both parties

logs.m: Listing terminated - clients moving back in, plan to relist after repairs
Honest conversation with sellers about three paths forward. Chandler laid off - hardship documentation available for short sale if needed.
Where Things Stand email sent with full market analysis and three options laid out

deals.title: 485 W FM 462
deals.notes: Divorce situation - need to sell. Payoff approximately $257,000. CMA recommends $295,000 listing price. Conservative range $275,000 to $315,000. Sellers need minimum $285,000-$290,000 to walk with meaningful proceeds.
deals.next: Get updated payoff letter from lender before listing. Schedule professional photos and get listing agreement signed.

logs.m: Met at property. Payoff confirmed $255,578 as of Feb 2026. CMA pulled - thin market with only 3 comps in 10 miles.
Prior clients - Chris helped with original VA renovation loan purchase. Going through divorce and need to sell.

deals.title: 10023 Mill Path
deals.notes: Listed May 14. Multiple showings with interested buyers. Second-look buyers are hottest lead - came back for second showing and it is their favorite property. Loan payoff discrepancy needs verification. Foundation hairline crack flagged for inspection.
deals.next: Confirm tomorrow showing time. Follow up with second-look buyers agent after pre-inspection report. Monitor for backup offer submission.

logs.m: Second-look buyers came back - it is their favorite. Walk-in closet flagged as slightly small. Pre-inspection report offered.
Texted Jose and Katy about investor cash offer at $176,300. 4th showing scheduled May 23.
MLS live - first showing feedback received. Cultural concern about street direction noted by Filipino buyers.

deals.title: 181 CR 7751
deals.notes: Bank-owned foreclosure. Cleanup nearly complete. Electric reconnected. Flooring starting this week. Water meter pending. Contractor: HouzzPro/Matt Toney. Cameras installed. Drywall complete and being painted.
deals.next: Call Medina Electric and EMCSUD to confirm utility status. Replace camera batteries on next site visit. Submit listing agreement to bank.

logs.m: Visited property - electricians reconnected everything. Drywall complete, paint finishing. Flooring starts this week.
Drywall crew actively patching. Sent photos to Kelly. Police reports still stalled.
Work officially started - dumpsters dropped and cleanup began

deals.title: Tilden 20 Acres
deals.notes: 20-acre hunting property. Contract accepted at $113,000 with Espinoza family. Buyer agent Javier. TXR 1903 amendment sent to update financing. EMD not yet received. Escrow opened with Chicago Title/Alyssa Castillo.
deals.next: Confirm EMD received. Confirm signed TXR 1903 amendment back from Javier. Verify Mrs. Espinoza email correct.

logs.m: Steve called back - Alejandra sent new T-47 via DocuSign. Steve completed and returned it.
New buyers Espinoza family identified. TXR 1903 amendment sent to Javier. Another agent called with backup buyers.
Clearing complete - Steve finished job and sent photos. First offer confirmed dead.

deals.title: 8449 Coughran Rd
deals.notes: Estate sale - cash transaction closed and funded April 27, 2026 at $152,000. Lien blocker resolved April 21. Military buyer through Exquisite SA.
deals.next: Confirm commission received. Deliver joy gift basket and thank you notes to title company and notary.

logs.m: Transaction officially confirmed closed and funded
Lien release signed by Fernando Castillo at mobile notary and delivered to Chicago Title
Photos and video shot. Sent to contractors for quotes

leads.title: Mike & Alice Howell
leads.detail: Rental being sold - need to move faster. Previously looked at 916 Marriott - major foundation issues. Pivoting to new construction with no HOA requirement. Out of 301 W Saxet Corpus deal. Still actively searching. Connected with lenders Zach Schaphorst and Erik Williams.
leads.next: Revisit new construction search. Confirm Zach pre-approval status. Identify builders and new home options matching their criteria.

logs.m: Out of 301 W Saxet deal - too much for them. Still actively searching.
Isaac brought wholesale deal 301 W Saxet at $85K. FHA 203k financing angle. Mike and Isaac scheduled call.
Rental property being sold. Pivoting to new construction with no HOA requirement.

leads.title: Bryce & Wife (VA Buyer)
leads.detail: Met on-site at 181 CR 7751 Priority Bank property. Bryce is dumpster contractor. Wife is active military - VA loan eligible. Recently moved from Ohio, currently renting in San Antonio area.
leads.next: Get Bryce contact info when on-site. Confirm wife VA eligibility. Connect with VA-approved lender.

logs.m: Met on-site at Priority Bank property. Wife is active military. Currently renting after move from Ohio.

leads.title: Brandon Moran & Milagros Stringer
leads.detail: Brandon - long-standing relationship, helped him get started in real estate. Milagros (mom) - new construction buyer prospect. Budget $50K down, target payment $1,000/month. Green Bliss rental setup also in progress. Buyer rep signed May 7.
leads.next: Send Milagros new construction options from multiple builders. Confirm lender status. No aging commissions with employee purchase route.

logs.m: Armando confirmed - no aging commissions if employee purchase route. Builder incentive stack matters.
Reached out to builders for options keeping payments around $1,000/month with $50K down
Buyer rep signed. Introduced team to Milagros. Awaiting signature to move forward.

leads.title: Jerome Gardner (Buyer - Fixer)
leads.detail: Jerome is downline agent in Schertz/Cibolo area. Has buyer interested in property that needs work. Unique situation with details still pending.
leads.next: Follow up with Jerome - get full details on buyer, property, financing, and work needed. Identify matching inventory.

logs.m: Caught up with Jerome - details pending on fixer property buyer situation

leads.title: Sallie Mae F.
leads.detail: Community connection through garden share group. Grief to healing through plants story. Potential content collaboration with permission. Trust-based long-term real estate potential.
leads.next: Follow up personally. Ask permission to share story. Keep nurturing relationship.

logs.m: Community connection - grief healing plants story. Content angle needs permission first.

leads.title: Miss Pat Neighbor - Inherited Property
leads.detail: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor behind her may have passed away. Son now owns house. Deceased was avid gardener. Son has not been contacted yet. Potential probate or inherited property listing.
leads.next: Get more info from Miss Pat - son name and contact. Reach out to son with empathy and garden angle.

logs.m: Miss Pat mentioned neighbor situation - son is new owner, deceased was avid gardener

leads.title: Armando (Employee Buyer)
leads.detail: Referred by David Roth (210-708-5644) - employee buyer program. Not committed to specific neighborhood or builder. Budget $50K down, target payment $1,000/month. No aging commissions with 5% down plus builder incentives.
leads.next: Get Armando contact info from David. Pull new construction options from multiple builders. Register as buyer agent before first builder visit.

logs.m: Confirmed - no aging commissions on employee purchase route with builder incentives

leads.title: Jahsia
leads.detail: 18 years old, finishing senior year. Interested in getting into real estate. Referred by Julie (veteran buyer). Worth conversation about licensing and eXp.
leads.next: Get contact info from Julie. Reach out with intro call about licensing path.

logs.m: Sent check-in text about Skool website. Awaiting response.
Referred by Julie during morning call. Young and motivated prospect.

leads.title: Isaac (Investor Lead)
leads.detail: Met in person recently. Investor with likely interest in Schertz area. Full intake still needed. Buy box, budget, and timeline unknown.
leads.next: Full Sage intake call - understand buy box, budget, timeline, strategy. Add to Bold Trail. Connect on active deals.

logs.m: Met in person - investor interested in Schertz area. No further details yet.

leads.title: Kurt (Neighbor Prospect)
leads.detail: Neighbor around corner from 9815 Conbes. Watching nearby listing under contract at $275,000. Wants intel on offers and deal details. Possible seller or buyer lead.
leads.next: Pull CMA for Kurt area. Get listing timeline for 9815 Conbes. Follow up with Kurt on his situation.

logs.m: Moving forward - pull CMA and set up next steps with Kurt
